title: Punjab & Haryana High Court stays case against Guru Randhawa over lyrics of 'Sirra' song
description: The Punjab and Haryana High Court recently stayed the criminal proceedings before a trial court against singer Gursharanjot Singh Randhawa, popularly known as Guru Randhawa, over the lyrics in his song “Sirra”. [Guru Randhawa v. Rajdeep Singh Mann]Justice Surya Partap Singh on March 20 noted that the trial court's order from August 25, 2025 indicated that the notice had been issued to Randhawa without recording preliminary evidence."The above-mentioned order (trail court's order) makes it appare
